title: solanum humile
intro: Solanum humile, also known as the creeping black nightshade or bitter nightshade, is a species of flowering plant in the family Solanaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Solanum humile include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Solanum humile is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, although it is essential to note that its leaves and berries can be toxic in large quantities, and proper preparation and dosing are necessary to ensure safety and efficacy.
